description: Daily module rotation state for iceberg-cpp code analysis. Each day one module is analyzed for: logic errors, Java consistency, and completeness.

modules.name: Core/Schema
modules.description: Core types, schema, table metadata, transforms, partitions, snapshots, file I/O

modules.name: Arrow
modules.description: Apache Arrow integration: data conversion, I/O, S3 file I/O, registration

modules.name: Avro
modules.description: Avro file format: reader, writer, schema utilities, encoding/decoding

modules.name: Catalog
modules.description: Catalog implementations: Hive, REST, SQL, in-memory catalogs

modules.name: Data
modules.description: Data layer: writers, scan task readers, delete filters and loaders

modules.name: Deletes
modules.description: Position delete files: bitmap indexes, roaring bitmaps, range consumers

modules.name: Expression
modules.description: Expression system: evaluators, binders, literals, aggregates, manifest/inclusive metrics evaluators

modules.name: Manifest
modules.description: Manifest handling: readers, writers, entries, groups, list merging and filtering

modules.name: Metrics
modules.description: Metrics reporting: scan/commit reports, counters, timers, JSON serialization

modules.name: Parquet
modules.description: Parquet file format: reader, writer, schema utilities, metrics

modules.name: Puffin
modules.description: Puffin format: statistics files, file metadata, reader/writer

modules.name: Row
modules.description: Row-level operations: Arrow array wrappers, partition values, struct-like interface

modules.name: Update
modules.description: Table updates: snapshot management, fast append, expire snapshots, partition spec updates

modules.name: Util
modules.description: Utilities: base64, decimal, hashing, formatting, configuration, error handling
